register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Join free and start learning the way your brain actually works.
register.terms: By creating an account you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy.
register.role_learner_hint: Take courses, earn certificates and Earn-Back.
register.role_instructor_hint: Create and sell courses, paths and assessments.
register.exists_title: This email already has an account

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to keep your streak going.
login.magic_sent: Sign-in link sent — check your email.

verify.title: Verify your email
verify.subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code and a magic link to {{email}}. Enter the code or click the link — whichever is faster.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot.sent_body: If an account exists for {{email}}, a reset link is on its way.

password_rules: At least 12 characters, with 1 uppercase letter, 1 number, and 1 special character.

errors.password_min: Password must be at least 12 characters
errors.password_uppercase: Add at least one uppercase letter
errors.password_special: Add at least one special character (!@#$...)

toasts.registered: Account created — check your email to verify.
toasts.backend_pending: This connects once the auth backend is wired up.
toasts.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.subtitle: Choose a strong password for your account.
reset.success: Password updated — sign in with your new password.
reset.invalid_body: Password reset links expire after 1 hour. Request a new one to continue.
